# How to Start an Email List for FREE (Literally $0!)

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2024-10-19 13:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 232

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Still don’t have an email list?

Is a lack of budget holding you back from starting a list?

No worries! Some email tools, like Mailchimp, let you start an
email list for free!

Unfortunately, its free plan comes with a limited feature set (up
to 500 contacts). Plus, its price gets expensive as you grow your
list.

So, I asked my team to put together a detailed list of the best
Mailchimp alternatives.

👉 7 Best Mailchimp Alternatives (with better free plans) 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.j3CIWtdamqNq8zdu3x7UMQy99fZtZmGnrjZOzmom67M )
 👈

#1 is best for beginners. #2 has a free plan for up to 100,000
contacts (whereas Mailchimp only offers 500 contacts)

If you’re on the fence, read this article 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.j3CIWtdamqNq8zdu3x7UMQy99fZtZmGnrjZOzmom67M )
 to start building an email list RIGHT NOW for free!

*************************************
Next – Send Smart Phone Notifications
*************************************

Now you know how to start an email list for free.

What if I told you that you can connect with your visitors
without sending emails?

Yes, you can send iPhone and Android notifications to your
visitors.

Here’s everything you need to learn about push notifications 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.FPKma5Xvv0vpIxSS3dEUsjZFBrnAcQ_2IJRLvPvmhik )
.

You can start it for free! In fact, push notifications are one of
our biggest traffic sources for WPBeginner.

***************************
Save Hours of Tedious Tasks
***************************

Be it email marketing or push notifications… several services are
available that can help you grow your subscribers and website
traffic for free.

Unfortunately, not everybody has the time or energy to focus on
growing their online business.

Does that sound like you?

Now… what if you could save hours every month and spend that time
where it matters?

This is why I offer website maintenance services on WPBeginner.
That way you can focus on growing subscribers and website
traffic, while my team manages tedious WordPress technical tasks.

Learn more about WordPress maintenance packages and plans 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..TRK4eVtGkCW9o_s7WQl6ORRf194MYPU78e6Y96TjBQ0 )
.

Have a great rest of your week :)

Cheers,
